creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Hi

I send a patch in order to support audacious player in audio/gkrellmms2
port (actually, only xmms and bmp are supported).


You have to apply the patch by the following way:

$ cd /usr/ports/audio/gkrellmms2
$ patch -p1 < audaciousGkrellmms2.txt



Regards

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
